#  Search Commitments (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The keyword search will look for commitments with a matching title.
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an Android device.
  2. Enter your keyword(s) into the Search bar.  
![Commitments Android Search Commitments](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e9706c9c9d785bffe8a019e6ec3f1f29/a30c95a779f9cf0a94be235fdc317050/commitments-android-search-commitments.png?fm=webp)  
Results with a matching commitment title will appear below the Search bar.


## See Also
  * [Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/edit-a-commitments-schedule-of-values-android)
  * [Edit a Purchase Order (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/edit-a-purchase-order-android)
  * [Create a Purchase Order (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-android)
title: Search Commitments (Android)
description: How to search for commitments using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
